prompt_summary: Asked LLM to design the two-component ablation study: testing α=0.0 (Pure Volume) and α=1.0 (Pure Specificity) against the paper's α=0.95.
llm_output_summary: LLM outlined the ablation methodology and predicted the failure modes for each extreme exponent value. Suggested a three-panel bar chart for comparison.
modifications_made: Independently wrote all scoring computations, ranking logic, and matplotlib visualisation code. Selected toy data values to clearly demonstrate both failure modes. Verified all rankings manually.
student_declaration: I declare that this JSON file represents an honest record of the LLM usage for this task. The ablation results were independently verified through manual calculation.
